name: Accidental Farmer & Co.
overview: Inheriting a debt-ridden farming estate is hardly a dream come true, especially for a man with no direction in life. Just about having given up on the barren land, the man stumbles upon a mysterious medicinal herb. He decides to cultivate it so he can pay off the debt but ends up attracting wanted as well as some unwanted attention.
